title: Founding Operator
must_haves: 1-5 years startup experience (MEETS: ~6.4 yrs, mostly early-stage)
Own entire revenue loop — GTM, sales execution, AI-automated workflows (PARTIAL: strong GTM/community, lighter direct sales-cycle execution)
Live in AI tools (MEETS strongly: builds AI agents)
hard_blockers: Domain: fintech (AI agents parsing financial documents for institutional investors / asset managers) — not crypto/Web3
Sales execution into financial-data firms — Ryan's revenue is community-led presale, not enterprise/asset-manager sales cycles
met_strengths: First-business-hire / founding generalist profile is exactly Ryan's lane
GTM, content, events, pipeline-building all in CV
AI-agent workflow design is a core strength
one_line_verdict: Excellent founding-operator shape and AI-tools alignment, but role appears closed (last hiring ~Mar 2026) and is fintech/asset-manager sales-led rather than community-led; likelihood null due to closure.
fetch_note: Listing found on Jack & Jill ops board; WebSearch indicates 'no longer actively hiring as of March 2026'. Arctal = Cambridge ML/finance founders, AI agents turning 100k+ financial documents into queryable data for institutional investors. £60-100k + equity, first business hire.
